lean_task.statement:
example {I : Type*} (R Rn : I -> Real) (fhat f : I) (eps delta : Real) (h_uniform : forall g, |Rn g - R g| <= delta) (h_erm : Rn fhat <= Rn f + eps) : R fhat <= R f + 2 * delta + eps := by
  exact StatInference.oracle_ineq_of_uniform_deviation R Rn fhat f eps delta h_uniform h_erm

natural_language: Prove the deterministic ERM oracle inequality from a uniform deviation bound.

lean_task.statement:
example {I : Type*} (R Rn : I -> Real) (fhat f : I) (eps delta : Real) (h_uniform : forall g, |Rn g - R g| <= delta) (h_erm : Rn fhat <= Rn f + eps) : R fhat - R f <= 2 * delta + eps := by
  exact StatInference.excess_risk_bound_of_uniform_deviation R Rn fhat f eps delta h_uniform h_erm

natural_language: Prove the excess-risk form of the deterministic ERM oracle inequality.

lean_task.statement:
example (b : StatInference.AsymptoticNormalityBridge) (hal : b.asymptotic_linear) (hclt : b.clt_for_linear_part) (hrem : b.negligible_remainder) : b.asymptotic_normality := by
  exact StatInference.asymptotic_normality_of_bridge b hal hclt hrem

natural_language: Apply the abstract asymptotic-normality bridge once assumptions are supplied.

lean_task.statement:
example (b : StatInference.ATEIdentificationBridge) (hoverlap : b.overlap.statement) (hunconf : b.unconfoundedness.statement) : b.identification := by
  exact StatInference.ate_identification_of_bridge b hoverlap hunconf

natural_language: Apply the abstract ATE identification bridge from overlap and unconfoundedness.
